name: 编译/运行时错误比 Compile vs Runtime

steps.t: Step 34: COMPILE — 'SyntaxError: unexpected character after line continuation'
Step 43: COMPILE — 'IndentationError: expected an indented block on line 452'
Step 57: RUNTIME — 'ConnectionError: Ray already running at 6379'
Step 266: RUNTIME — 'AssertionError: Session name does not match'
